name: Yum! Brands, Inc.
description: Yum! Brands, Inc., based in Louisville, Kentucky, is a leading American multinational fast-food corporation that operates some of the world's most iconic restaurant chains, including KFC, Taco Bell, Pizza Hut, and The Habit Burger & Grill. With a vast global footprint, the company manages a system of over 63,000 restaurants across more than 155 countries and territories. Through its partnership with a diverse network of franchisees, Yum! Brands focuses on building loved, trusted, and connected restaurant brands while driving growth through innovation, digital transformation, and a commitment to sustainable and responsible business practices.
